summary: C: drive free space is critically low. Lane 7 requests Lane 4 dry-run and, only if safe, apply cleanup for stale date-stamped EC2 mirror snapshots after the active EC2 lease is released.

active_ec2_constraint.lane4_thread_note: Lane 4 reported AWS RequestExpired/expired credentials after the stop request; final EC2 terminal-state proof still needs owner-lane verification or blocker record.

required_constraints: No cleanup apply while EC2 lease is held
